name: particle-academy/fancy-flow-php
description: PHP runtime for fancy-flow workflow graphs — the framework-free twin of @particle-academy/fancy-flow's engine. Same WorkflowSchema JSON in, same outputs out; author in <FlowEditor>, run on PHP.

suggest.illuminate/support: Enables the optional Laravel layer — service provider, facade, queued durable runs, #[FlowNode] discovery, Artisan, and RunEvent → Laravel events. Compatible with 10.x through 13.x. The framework-free core (Workflow, FlowRunner, registries, the 24 built-ins) needs no framework.
suggest.prism-php/prism: Makes the `llm_branch` node work with zero glue — auto-detected and wired through the shipped Prism adapter (structured output constrained to the declared routes).
suggest.laravel/ai: Makes the `llm_branch` node work with zero glue — auto-detected and wired through the shipped laravel/ai adapter (structured output constrained to the declared routes).
